subject: Transient in GCN 20367 is a mistaken submission
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E.S. Gorbovskoy
Lomonosov Moscow State University, Sternberg Astronomical Institute

The OT wich published in GCN 20367 is the result of the false identification.
We are sorry for this mistake.

The message may be cited.
